引用 HDDolby官组作品，源站种子ID：239825，感谢原制作者发布。




◎译　　名　爱的色彩 / An Autumn Romance
◎上映日期　2021-05-07
◎产　　地　Canada, United States of America
◎类　　别　爱情 / 剧情 / 家庭
◎语　　言　en
◎时　　长　110分钟
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt13273728/
◎豆瓣链接  https://movie.douban.com/subject/35235271/
◎TMDb链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/810223
◎TMDb评分  7.149/10 from 161 users
◎导　　演　Bradley Walsh
◎主　　演　杰西卡·朗德斯
　　　　  　查德·迈克尔·墨瑞
　　　　  　Dennis Andres
　　　　  　Michael Brown
　　　　  　Kent Sheridan
　　　　  　Jenni Burke
　　　　  　Delia Lisette Chambers
　　　　  　Darlene Cooke
　　　　  　Andrea Davis
　　　　  　Moni Ogunsuyi

◎简　　介

　　当图书管理员泰勒哈里斯突然失业时，她搬回了蒙大拿州的小家乡。在那里，她参与了从大亨乔尔希南那里拯救她哥哥的小镇酒店的斗争，乔尔希南想要翻修这座酒店。

item.title: [已拥有] [恋文] Love Letter AKA Koibumi 1953 1080p BluRay FLAC1.0 x264-ZoroSenpai[恋文 / Koibumi / Love Letter | 类型：爱情 | Carlotta Films / B&W / 4K修复版][13.53 GB][anonymous]
item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Sat, 09 May 2026 01:23:07 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=291435

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　Koibumi/Love Letter
◎片　　名　恋文
◎年　　代　1953
◎产　　地　日本
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　爱情
◎语　　言　日语
◎上映日期　1953-12-13(日本)
◎IMDb评分　7.3/10 from 111 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0407929/
◎豆瓣评分　7.2/10 from 667 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/1828009/
◎片　　长　98分钟
◎简　　介
　　从战场回到祖国的真弓礼吉（森雅之 饰）为了寻找青梅竹马的初恋爱人道子（久我美子 饰）来到东京，一文不名的他和经营旧书收购生意的弟弟阿洋（道三重三 饰）住在简陋的公寓里，靠弟弟的收入勉强过活。某天，礼吉在街上巧遇军校的同学山路直人（宇野重吉 饰），直人靠写英文、法文信件为生，服务的对象则是一群曾和外籍士兵相恋、而如今恋人回国被留在日本的可怜女性。

　　不想拖累弟弟的礼吉接受直人的邀请，来到铃兰地区帮助女人们撰写信件。偶然的一天，他邂逅了寻觅已久的道子，而道子恰是这群苦命女性中的一员……

引用 Love Letter AKA Koibumi 1953 1080p BluRay FLAC1.0 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Love.Letter.1953.1080p.BluRay.FLAC1.0.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Named)
Source(1).......: FRA Carlotta Films 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 1.0-alqm (Thanks @alonquijano!) (Video, Audio, Subtitle)
Source(2).......: USA Criterion Collection 1080p Blu-ray AVC LPCM 1.0-TMT (Thanks @TMT) (Subtitle)
Source(3).......: JPN Tech Communications NTSC DVD (Thanks!) (Chapters)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison || Audio Comparison || Comparison

▣ Video: For this one, FRA BD has better overall consistent grain & slightly better PQ than the USA BD. Both are from the same master. Love Letter was restored in 4K resolution by Kokusai Hoei, Co., Ltd. in cooperation with The Japan Foundation. The dirt lines were manually fixed. The source has bit-crushed detail in black & a lack of grain in some places, so added light grain based on that masking.

▣ Audios: The USA BD has a lot of filtering and has an upper limit frequency of 11 kHz, while the FRA BD has a higher upper limit of 16 kHz with more treble information. Since it sounded better, the FRA audio was used. It was converted to 16-bit FLAC.

▣ Subtitles & Chapters: The English & French subtitles were OCR'ed & checked by me. The Chinese subtitles were taken from @PTer encode.  There was Japanese named chapters in the NTSC DVD, which were translated and cross-checked with the subtitle & movie. Both Japanese & English names were added. The QP file was used to ensure chapters on IDR frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!

item.title: [已拥有] [阿吟小姐] Love Under the Crucifix AKA Ogin-sama 1962 1080p BluRay FLAC1.0 x264-ZoroSenpai[阿吟小姐 / 吟公主 / お吟さま | 类别：剧情 | Carlotta Films / 4K修复版][13.56 GB][anonymous]
item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Sat, 09 May 2026 01:21:59 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=291434

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　阿吟小姐/吟公主/Love Under the Crucifix/Ogin-sama
◎片　　名　お吟さま
◎年　　代　1962
◎产　　地　日本
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情
◎语　　言　日语
◎上映日期　1962-06-03(日本)
◎IMDb评分　6.9/10 from 146 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0203751/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/5088650/
◎片　　长　102分钟
◎简　　介
　　今東光の原作を、『江戸っ子繁昌記』の成澤昌茂が脚色、『女ばかりの夜』の田中絹代が監督した時代劇ロマンス。天正15年、豊臣秀吉の茶頭・千利休の娘・吟は、6年間一筋に慕い続けてきたキリシタン大名・高山右近をむかえて喜びにもえた。しかし、妻のある右近は、キリシタンの教えを破ってまで、吟の思いを受け入れることは出来なかった。折も折、父・利休は石田三成から吟の縁談を持ち帰った。相手は、太閤茶湯七人衆の1人、廻船問屋万代屋宗安である。気の進まぬ吟は、必死の思いで右近にその思慕を打ちあけたが、右近は苦しい思いで万代屋へ嫁ぐよう吟にすすめるのだった。2年後、万代屋へ嫁いだ吟は、いまだ右近への思慕をたちきれず、そんな吟にあきたらぬ宗安は、放蕩三昧の生活だった。ある日、宗安が招いた茶会の席上、吟は右近に会った・・・。

引用 Love Under the Crucifix AKA Ogin-sama 1962 1080p BluRay FLAC1.0 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Love.Under.the.Crucifix.1962.1080p.BluRay.FLAC1.0.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Numbered)
Source(1).......: FRA Carlotta Films 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 1.0-alqm (Thanks @alonquijano!) (Video, Audio, Subtitle)
Source(2).......: USA Criterion Collection 1080p Blu-ray AVC LPCM 1.0-TMT (Thanks @TMT) (Subtitle)
Source(3).......: NTSC TV DVD5 (Thanks) (Comparison)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison || Audio Comparison || Comparison

▣ Video: Love Under the Crucifix was restored in 4K resolution by Shochiku Co, Ltd. in cooperation with The Japan Foundation. Same case here, the USA & FRA BD are from a similar master. For this title, the FRA BD shows more consistent PQ than the USA BD; the USA BD loses grain in the background most times, the same as the previous ones. So, the FRA BD was used as the source. The dirt lines were fixed. The source has bit-crushed detail in black & a lack of grain in some places, so added light grain based on that masking.

▣ Audios: For this title, the FRA BD has the only audio where the unfiltered frequency range is up to 22 kHz. In contrast, the sources show a distinct "brick wall" cutoff at lower frequencies, which stripped away the high-end detail. It was converted to 16-bit FLAC.

▣ Subtitles & Chapters: The English & French subtitles were OCR'ed & checked by me. There were no named chapters, so took from the USA BD & synced to the closest I-frames. The QP file was used to ensure chapters on IDR frames. The Chinese subtitle was from @zimuku.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!

◎译　　名  尤为明亮的生物
◎片　　名　Remarkably Bright Creatures
◎年　　代　2026
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　剧情
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　2026-05-08(美国网络)
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt33100314/
◎豆瓣评分　/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/37005312/
◎导　　演  奥利维亚·纽曼 Olivia Newman
◎编　　剧  奥利维亚·纽曼 Olivia Newman / 约翰·惠廷顿 John Whittington / Shane Van Pelt Shane Van Pelt
◎主　　演  莎莉·菲尔德 Sally Field
          刘易斯·普尔曼 Lewis Pullman
          丹·佩恩 Dan Payne
          贝丝·格兰特 Beth Grant
          科尔姆·米尼 Colm Meaney
          劳拉·哈里斯 Laura Harris
          索菲亚·布莱克-德埃利亚 Sofia Black-D'Elia
          凯西·贝克 Kathy Baker
          陈冲 Joan Chen
          梅根·赫弗恩 Meghan Heffern
          唐纳德·沙利斯 Donald Sales
          萨莎·威廉斯 Sasha Craig
          迈尔斯·马萨勒 Miles Marthaller
          Brandon McEwan Brandon McEwan
          Emily Giannozio Emily Giannozio
          卡里姆·马尔科姆 Kareem Malcolm
          Kingston Goodjohn Kingston Goodjohn
          Ezra Wilson Ezra Wilson
          安东尼·哈里森 Anthony Harrison
          诺亚·克雷格 Noah Craig
          卡罗琳·亚代尔 Carolyn Adair
          阿尔弗雷德·莫里纳 Alfred Molina

◎简　　介  

　讲述孤独的寡妇Tova是水族馆的看门人，她与那里一只坏脾气的章鱼Marcellus成了好朋友。Tova不知道的是，这只巨大的八爪鱼和这段出人意料的友谊不仅将治愈她的心，还会揭示一个对她来说很重要的秘密。

引用
★★★★★ General Information ★★★★★

item.description:
🔗 来源: ptchdbits

📅 发布时间: Sat, 09 May 2026 00:00:11 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://ptchdbits.co/details.php?id=547715

📄 原文内容:



◎译　　名　伪钞重案
◎年　　代　2026
◎产　　地　中国大陆
◎类　　别　剧情 / 动作 / 犯罪
◎语　　言　汉语普通话
◎上映日期　2026-05-08(中国大陆网络)
◎IMDb链接　
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/38433149/
◎片　　长　97分钟
◎导　　演　霍穗强 Suiqiang Huo (id:34463331)
◎编　　剧　王翰林 Hanlin Wang (id:34811329)
◎演　　员　吴樾 Yue Wu (id:27492768)
　　　　　 谭凯 Kai Tan (id:27547196)
　　　　　 包贝尔 Bei'er Bao (id:27482823)
　　　　　 修睿 Rui Xiu (id:27569686)
　　　　　 王李丹鈮 Daniella Wang (id:27556710)
　　　　　 梁颂晴 Songqing Liang (id:35209195)
　　　　　 雷牧 Mu Lei (id:27499822)
　　　　　 好奇 Qi Hao (id:37426725)
　　　　　 沐岚 Lan Mu (id:30166610)
　　　　　 王蕴凡 Yunfan Wang (id:27558177)

◎简　　介
　　上世纪九十年代，特大伪钞案暗流涌动，社会动荡不安。退役散打王郑明为救治白血病女儿，意外踏入凶险的伪钞产业链，在生死边缘挣扎求生。刑警谢家同誓破伪钞源头，二人从针锋相对到暗中周旋，上演猫鼠博弈。郑明在暴利与良知间反复拉扯，暗中向警方传递线索，试图戴罪立功。当他决心交出核心伪钞母版、彻底脱身时，女儿却被绑架要挟。绝境之下，他与谢家同放下隔阂，联手出击，在宗族宗祠与民俗游行中展开终极血战，捣毁庞大伪钞帝国，以热血捍卫正义与亲情。



引用

item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Sat, 09 May 2026 00:06:14 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=291427

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　触碰我
◎片　　名　Touch Me
◎年　　代　2025
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情 / 喜剧 / 科幻 / 恐怖 / 同性
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　2025-01-28(圣丹斯电影节)
◎IMDb评分　5.5/10 from 234 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt34967068/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/37153712/
◎简　　介
　　Two codependent best friends become addicted to the heroin-like touch of an alien narcissist who may or may not be trying to take over the world.

　　Writer and director Addison Heimann’s second feature film is provocatively comedic, inventive, and insane in the best possible way. An ode to the deliriously stylistic lens of Japanese cinema in the ’60s and ’70s, Touch Me dares to “go there” with its themes of mental health, desire, and Hentai-infused sexual abandon. Olivia Taylor Dudley sinks into character to portray a fractured and wandering human being in desperate need of a life-affirming touch, while Lou Taylor-Pucci’s tracksuit-clad alien persona is played to delightful perfection. Jordan Gavaris and Marlene Forte round out an impeccable cast of far-out characters who manage to be at once acrimonious yet relatable. The end result is a weird, wild, and frenzied fever dream with so much to unpack. While we may not be able to relieve ourselves of self-doubt, deep-seated childhood trauma, and debilitating anxiety with the simple touch of an extraterrestrial being, maybe life isn’t so bad after all?

引用 Touch Me 2025 1080p BluRay DD+5.1 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Touch.Me.2025.1080p.BluRay.DDP5.1.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Numbered)
Source(1).......: GBR Lightbulb Film Distribution 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1 (Thanks @the6thday!) (Video, Audio,  Chapters)
Source(2).......: 1080p AMZN WEB-DL DD+5.1 H.264-BobDobbs (Thanks @BobDobbs!) (Subtitles)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Zoned Frames Comparison || Comparison

▣ There were different AR all over the movie; they were identified, such as 59,866 frames or 11 ranges of AR 2.388, 74,918 frames or 10 ranges of AR 1.66, and others had AR 1.33; all the dirt lines on all AR ranges were fixed. There were banding frames of 1257 frames or 5 ranges, which were filtered & zoned alongside end credit frames. The whole movie had flat dark areas, so added light grain based on that masking. The end credits chapter was added. The QP file was used to ensure chapters on IDR frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!
